Andrea McGary, Esq., of The McGary Firm, Tel. 415.874.3500, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.
Jonathan Bornstein, Esq., of Bornstein & Bornstein, Tel. 415.409.7611, appearing for Defendant and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA DRY CLEANING TECH, INC.'s Amended Motion For An Order To Correct Clerical Error In Judgment And Amend Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc is granted. Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrea McGary, Esq., of The McGary Firm, Tel. 415.874.3500, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.
Jonathan Bornstein, Esq., of Bornstein & Bornstein, Tel. 415.409.7611, appearing for Defendant and opposing party.
Jakie Lim, defendant, also present in court.

RULING: A R G U E D. Plaintiff California Dry Cleaning Tech, Inc's (Amended) Motion For Order On Judgment Debtor's Addition Names And Aliases is granted. Defendant Jakie Lim was sworn and examined at the hearing. After hearing, the court finds that Judgment Debtor maintain the name Bong K. Lim and the additonal name Jakie Lim. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
